summary.intent: Implement Phase 2.3 Composite Strategies (MeanReversionStrategy, MomentumStrategy, VolatilityStrategy, EnsembleStrategy) using TDD with a commit after each strategy.
summary.outcome: All 4 composite strategies were implemented and committed, bringing total tests to 377 (all passing) with 97% coverage. STRATEGIES.md and CLAUDE.md were updated to reflect completion.

repo: Validation uses `validate_integer` not `validate_positive_integer` for integer parameters
Dataframe column validation uses `validate_price_data(df, column='Close')` not `required_columns=[...]`
Signal shift by 1 day is applied in all strategies to prevent look-ahead bias
warmup_period for composite strategies is max() of component indicator periods
EnsembleStrategy uses majority voting via configurable `min_agreement` parameter
ta library provides ROCIndicator in ta.momentum and AverageTrueRange in ta.volatility

code.finding: MeanReversionStrategy, MomentumStrategy, VolatilityStrategy, and EnsembleStrategy were all appended after FibonacciRetracementStrategy
validate_price_data takes a `column` keyword arg (singular string), not `required_columns` (list)
Warmup period assertions must be checked against actual strategy instances rather than assumed values; a typo fix and warmup period correction were needed after first test run

workflow: TDD workflow: write test file with Write tool, verify ta library API with Bash, then implement with Edit tool
Checking ta indicator method signatures with `inspect.signature` or `help()` via Bash is faster than documentation lookup
Running strategy-specific tests before the full suite catches issues early and saves time
Committing after each individual strategy (not batching) keeps git history granular and traceable

friction: Initial MeanReversionStrategy tests failed due to using `validate_positive_integer` which doesn't exist; had to inspect validation.py to find correct function names
validate_price_data call used wrong keyword argument `required_columns` instead of `column`, requiring a second fix pass
EnsembleStrategy tests had a typo and incorrect warmup period assumptions, requiring multiple edit-and-rerun cycles
Context window exhaustion mid-session required summary-based continuation, causing some rework to re-establish state
open_items: Phase 3: Walk-Forward Analysis (WFA) not yet started
EnsembleStrategy voting logic could be extended with weighted voting (currently uniform weights)
No integration tests verifying composite strategies work end-to-end within the backtesting engine
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md may need updating to mark Phase 2.3 as complete
